user.title: Connect to Coder
user.description: Enter your Coder deployment URL. If the server supports OAuth2 and Home Assistant is reachable over HTTPS, you'll be redirected to sign in; otherwise you'll be asked for a session token.

token.title: Coder session token
token.description: Paste a session token from Account → Tokens.

abort.already_configured: This Coder deployment is already configured.
abort.dcr_failed: Coder rejected the OAuth2 client registration. Try a session token instead.
abort.oauth2_failed: OAuth2 sign-in did not complete. Try again or use a session token.
abort.missing_configuration: Coder OAuth2 client is not configured.
abort.authorize_url_timeout: Timeout while generating the authorize URL.
abort.no_url_available: Home Assistant has no HTTPS URL Coder can redirect back to.
abort.oauth_timeout: Timeout while resolving the OAuth2 token.

create_chat.name: Create chat
create_chat.description: Create a new Coder chat with an initial prompt.

send_chat_message.name: Send chat message
send_chat_message.description: Post a message to an existing chat.

get_chat.name: Get chat
get_chat.description: Fetch a chat's current status and metadata.
